Document:
# Station 7 — Server Rules
Welcome to Station 7. Please read and understand these rules before playing. Admins will treat you as if you have read them, even if you have not.
## Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Be Respectful" link="RuleE1"] - [textlink="2. No Griefing" link="RuleE2"] - [textlink="3. Stay In Character" link="RuleE3"] - [textlink="4. Listen To Admins" link="RuleE4"] - [textlink="5. No Cheating or Exploiting" link="RuleE5"]
